description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs. The flatpak job runs in the build stage using the Docker image registry.gitlab.gnome.org/gnome/gnome-runtime-images/gnome:master, sets variables APP_ID=org.gabmus.hydrapaper, FLATPAK_MODULE=hydrapaper, MANIFEST_PATH=dist/flatpak/org.gabmus.hydrapaper.json, MESON_ARGS='-Dprofile=Devel', RUNTIME_REPO='https://flathub.org/repo/flathub.flatpakrepo' and BUNDLE=hydrapaper.flatpak, and executes the standard flatpak CI commands (flatpak-builder with the manifest and runtime repo, then flatpak build-bundle to produce $BUNDLE). The test job runs in the test stage using python:3.9, installs flake8 via pip, and runs flake8 hydrapaper. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined, so both jobs run on every pipeline execution.
